title: Bray's Zombie Overhaul
description: Provide variety to the undead with custom textures and models for Zombies, Husks and Drowned. Requires EMF/ETF
body:
# Bray's Zombie Overhaul!
**Bray's Zombie Overhaul** is a pack that brings new variety to the textures and models of zombies! This includes random models and textures as well as biome and y-level specific variants.
![Zombie Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdeb9efb39fc7577eea3f8fa0d4bde566e6f623d.png)

<details>
<summary>ZOMBIE VARIANTS</summary>

## Default Zombies
![Default Zombies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45dfff6ac9e89df6bb155f6d6ef58f8d57742d73.png)
Found in most biomes

## Arrowed Zombies
![Arrowed Zombies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90fdaff62c3c1f99deedcc24f6559e54fdf8f2fb.png)
Found in most biomes
  
## Swamp Zombies
![Swamp Zombies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8f0e51ca9459cd80dd143662b76137ff51135d7.png)
Found in swampy biomes

## Cave Zombies
![Cave Zombies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a8bc14dc2df6ae19b8a03b260560019edb7efff.png)
Found below Y: -15 in caves

## Cowboy Zombies
![Cowboy Zombies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7311404a934839408bda1225598e5a1c8f89ddb3.png)
Found in badland biomes

## Special Zombies
![Special Zombies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/985b96cf780deaef223ff851a39fb4f6add709cd.png)
Have a lower chance of spawning and are rarer to find


</details>

More unique and biome-dependant variants to come!

<center>
  
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b716f9bf1f25106aea330ff2308302ce911dea3a.png)](https://discord.gg/H7JPX6hPQB)
[![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66483ab22160e1621066e9df3c259615edd2ba9.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@BraysWorld_MC)

</center>
